title: onobrychis lassenii
intro: Onobrychis lassenii, also known as Lassen's bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help in managing conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. Onobrychis lassenii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to support immune function and overall well-being.
